metadata.description: On edX, enroll in CS50 by selecting the free audit track and completing the enrollment process until the course content or dashboard is accessible.

common_info.email_credentials: credentials to use the assigned disposable email account

instruction: Log into edX and enroll in CS50 by selecting the free audit track and completing the enrollment process until the course content or dashboard is accessible.
